creator: dyeske@yahoo.com
text:
I do not approve this PR.  I am in progress of updating the blender port to=
 2.43.=0A=0AThis pr is also invalid as it is a shell archive.  It should be=
 submitted as a diff since blender and blender-devel are not new ports.=0A=
=0A----- Original Message ----=0AFrom: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>=
=0ATo: dyeske@yahoo.com=0ASent: Wednesday, January 3, 2007 2:50:35 PM=0ASub=
ject: Re: ports/107494: Update port: graphics/blender update to 2.42a=0A=0A=
Maintainer of graphics/blender,=0A=0APlease note that PR ports/107494 has j=
ust been submitted.=0A=0AIf it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancem=
ent or a bug fix=0Ayou agree on, reply to this email stating that you appro=
ve the patch=0Aand a committer will take care of it.=0A=0AThe full text of =
the PR can be found at:=0A    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D=
ports/107494=0A=0A-- =0AEdwin Groothuis=0Aedwin@FreeBSD.org=0A=0A=0A=0A=0A_=
